description: Account of the Qodesh: building expenditures, ca. 1040. Mainly materials for ceilings and roofs, palm branches, ropes, reeds, etc. Treesare also listed and the supply of doors. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 189 #20.) In the hand of Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya.
tags: 11th c, communal, account, Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya, waqf, qodesh
description_he: חשבון הקדש: עבודות בנייה, כ-1040. עיקרן חומרי גגות: ענפי דקל, חבלים, קנים ודלתות. בכתב יפת בן דוד בן שכניה.
